title: User Management
createFirstUser: Invite your first team member to get started
failedToLoad: Failed to load users. Please refresh.

inviteModal.title: Add a new vendor account
inviteModal.subtitle: Invite a new team member to your company
inviteModal.createError: Failed to send invitation. Please try again.
inviteModal.emailInUse: This email is already in use.

invitationSuccess.title: Invitation has been sent successfully
invitationSuccess.subtitle: An invitation has been sent to the provided email address.
invitationSuccess.emailSent: The user {{email}} will receive an activation email with a secure link to set their password. Once the password is set, they will become a member of the company and gain access to the system.
invitationSuccess.linkExpiry: The reset link will expire in 4 hour. The user and their data will remain in the system, allowing you to resend the link if needed
invitationSuccess.redirecting: Redirecting to "User Management" page in {{seconds}} seconds…

userAlreadyExists.title: User already exists
userAlreadyExists.description: A user with this email already exists in the system. Please use a different email or invite the user instead.

deactivateModal.title: Deactivate User
deactivateModal.subtitle: This user will lose access to the system immediately.
deactivateModal.info: You are going to deactivate the user {{email}}. After changing the status, the user will no longer be able to log in.

activateModal.title: Activate User
activateModal.subtitle: This user will regain access to the system immediately.
activateModal.info: You are going to activate the user {{email}}. After changing the status, the user will be able to log in again.

cancelInvitationModal.title: Cancel Invitation
cancelInvitationModal.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.
cancelInvitationModal.info: You are about to cancel the invitation for {{email}}. This will permanently remove their account from the platform.

resendInvitationModal.title: Resend Invitation
resendInvitationModal.subtitle: A new invitation will be sent to this user.
resendInvitationModal.info: A new invitation link will be sent to {{email}}. The previous invitation link will be invalidated.

editModal.title: Edit User Details
editModal.subtitle: Update the user's personal information.
editModal.updateError: Failed to update user. Please try again.
